productDisplayName: Puma Men's Mid Black Silver Shoe
description: These shoes from puma's ferrari collection are meant for racing enthusiasts and fashion lovers alike. The sleek uppers with smooth formstripe along the sides and a gel &ldquo Scuderia Ferrari&rdquo badge are a fresh take on the popular Ferrari collection. The rubber and TPU soles provide excellent traction. Cheer on Team Ferrari on the race tracks with these uber cool shoes.Upper Premium leather upper for longer wear Adjustable collar strap with debossed puma logo for optimum Fit Asymmetrical lacing system alleviates pressure points Fine mesh lining Bold, contrasting formstrip logo outlining Midsole Cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort Cushy midsole for comfort and stability Signature tonal Scuderia Ferrari logo shield Outsole Textured rubber outsole provides traction
